data_text_cable_club.inc.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_2F_Text_1A4510: Welcome to the POKéMON CABLE CLUB\nCOLOSSEUM.\pYou may battle with your friends here.\pWould you like to battle?
data_text_cable_club.inc.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_2F_Text_1A457E: Welcome to the POKéMON CABLE CLUB\nTRADE CENTER.\pYou may trade your POKéMON here\nwith a friend.\pWould you like to trade POKéMON?
data_text_cable_club.inc.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_2F_Text_1A45FE: Welcome to the POKéMON CABLE CLUB\n
data_text_cable_club.inc.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_2F_Text_1A4696:
There are three link battle modes.\pSINGLE BATTLE is for two TRAINERS
with one or more POKéMON each.\pEach TRAINER can have one POKéMON
in battle at a time.\pDOUBLE BATTLE is for two TRAINERS
with two or more POKéMON each.\pEach TRAINER will send out two
POKéMON in battle at a time.\pMULTI BATTLE is for four TRAINERS
with one or more POKéMON each.\pEach TRAINER can have one POKéMON
in battle at a time.
data_text_cable_club.inc.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_2F_Text_1A4840: Which Battle Mode would you like\nto play?
data_text_cable_club.inc.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_2F_Text_1A486A: For a DOUBLE BATTLE, you must have\nat least two POKéMON.
data_text_cable_club.inc.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_2F_Text_1A48A3: For trading, you must have at least\ntwo POKéMON with you.
data_text_cable_club.inc.UnknownString_81A4932: When all players are ready...\nA Button: Confirm   B Button: Cancel
data_text_cable_club.inc.UnknownString_81A4975: Start link with {STR_VAR_1} players.\nA Button: Confirm   B Button: Cancel
data_text_cable_club.inc.UnknownString_81A49E2: Your progress must be saved before\nlinking. Is it okay to save?
data_text_cable_club.inc.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_2F_Text_1A4A30: Someone is not ready to link.\pPlease come back after everyone has\nmade preparations.
data_text_cable_club.inc.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_2F_Text_1A4A85: Sorry, we have a transmission error...\nPlease reset and try again.
data_text_cable_club.inc.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_2F_Text_1A4AC8: Sorry, we have a transmission error.\nYou may not mix records in different\llanguages.
data_text_cable_club.inc.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_2F_Text_1A4B1D: The link partners appear to have made\ndifferent selections.
data_text_cable_club.inc.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_2F_Text_1A4B95: The SINGLE Battle Mode cannot be\nplayed by {STR_VAR_1} players.
data_text_cable_club.inc.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_2F_Text_1A4BCC: The DOUBLE Battle Mode cannot be\nplayed by {STR_VAR_1} players.
data_text_cable_club.inc.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_2F_Text_1A4C03: There must be four players to play\nthis Battle Mode.
data_text_cable_club.inc.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_2F_Text_1A4C38: Please confirm the number of players\nand start again.
data_text_cable_club.inc.TradeRoom_WillLinkBeTerminated: The link will be terminated if you\nleave the room. Is that okay?
data_text_cable_club.inc.TradeRoom_TerminatingLink: Terminating link... You will be\nescorted out of the room. Please wait.
data_text_cable_club.inc.CableClub_TooBusyToNotice: This TRAINER is too busy to notice...
data_text_cable_club.inc.CableClub_LookAtTrainerCard1: Score! Got to look at {STR_VAR_1}'s\nTRAINER CARD!
data_text_cable_club.inc.CableClub_LookAtTrainerCard2: Score! Got to look at {STR_VAR_1}'s\nTRAINER CARD! It's a {STR_VAR_2} card!
data_text_cable_club.inc.SingleBattleColosseum_Text_1A4D7E: Please take your seat and start\nyour battle.
data_text_cable_club.inc.TradeCenter_Text_1A4DAB: Please take your seat and start\nyour trade.
data_text_cable_club.inc.RecordCorner_Text_1A4DD7: Please take your seat and wait.
data_text_cable_club.inc.UnknownString_81A4E0A: Please choose your POKéMON for the\nMULTI BATTLE.
data_text_cable_club.inc.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_2F_Text_1A4E50: The TRAINER CARD data will\nbe rewritten.
data_text_cable_club.inc.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_2F_Text_1A4E79: I hope to see you again!
